summary: Plan-mode classification only. #73676 remains the best live canonical issue for the deleted-CWD CLI startup crash. #74994 is already closed and marked security-sensitive in the preflight artifact, so it is quarantined read-only rather than used for closeout or merge planning. #83875 is already merged/closed and is related historical context, not the live canonical for the remaining CLI startup/dotenv/TUI crash.

actions.reason: #73676 is the only open non-security primary item and still tracks the unresolved user-visible crash.
